title: T-018 — Spec CRUD + version clone Server Actions (09-b-02)
prompt:
# T-018 — Spec CRUD + version clone

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §7.1 EPIC 8B, §11.3 V-QA-SPEC, §16.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions: createDraftSpec, updateDraftSpec, cloneToNewVersion (increments version, copies parameters), submitForReview (status -> 'under_review'). Edit-only-on-draft enforced (V-QA-SPEC-001 + immutability of approved specs).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/specs.ts` exports the four Server Actions with Zod validation.
2. createDraftSpec: status='draft' default, version=1 if no prior, else max(version)+1.
3. cloneToNewVersion(specId): copies header + child parameters, status='draft', superseded_by remains null until activation.
4. updateDraftSpec rejects when status != 'draft'; submitForReview only from status='draft'.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/specs.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/specs.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an active spec v1, when cloneToNewVersion(v1.id) runs, then a new spec row exists with same spec_code+product_id, version=2, status='draft', and all parent parameters are copied to v2 (count match)
2. Given a spec with status='active', when updateDraftSpec(id, patch) runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-006 IMMUTABLE error and writes nothing
3. Given a spec with status='draft', when submitForReview(id) runs, then status='under_review' and an audit log entry with operation='UPDATE' and changed_fields containing 'status' is appended
4. Given a draft spec where one parameter has min_value > max_value, when submitForReview runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-003 (server re-validates)

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions createDraftSpec / updateDraftSpec / cloneToNewVersion / submitForReview with version increment and immutability enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Zod-validated Server Actions; createDraftSpec auto-versions; cloneToNewVersion copies parameters; updateDraftSpec rejects when status!='draft'; submitForReview transitions draft->under_review and re-runs V-QA-SPEC-002/003. RBAC quality_lead-only for submit; quality_lead+admin for create/clone. Audit log entries via existing trigger (T-040).
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen profile snapshot (T-020)
acceptance_criteria: Given an active spec v1, when cloneToNewVersion(v1.id) runs, then a new row exists with same (spec_code,product_id), version=2, status='draft', and all parent parameters are copied (count match)
Given a spec with status='active', when updateDraftSpec(id,patch) runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-006 IMMUTABLE error and writes nothing
Given a draft spec, when submitForReview(id) runs, then status becomes 'under_review' and an audit log entry with operation='UPDATE' and changed_fields containing 'status' is appended
Given a draft spec with a parameter where min_value>max_value, when submitForReview runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-003
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/specs.test.ts asserting clone copy, immutability rejection, status transition with audit append, and V-QA-SPEC-003 re-validation
risk_red_lines: Do not allow updateDraftSpec on non-draft status
Do not skip server-side V-QA-SPEC-003 even if client validates first
Do not omit audit log append on status transitions
